name: EDGEWELL PERSONAL CARE Co
business: Edgewell Personal Care Company manufactures and markets personal care products in Wet Shave, Sun and Skin Care, and Feminine Care segments. Its products include razors, shaving gels, sunscreens, skin care, and feminine hygiene products. The company sells to mass merchandisers, drug stores, grocery stores, and directly to consumers via e-commerce.

exposures.sentence: Edgewell Personal Care Company, and its subsidiaries, is one of the world’s largest manufacturers and marketers of personal care products in the Wet Shave, Sun and Skin Care, and Feminine Care segments.

As a result of increased competition through the expansion of online markets, we have established e-commerce operations across several business lines, including global Schick.com websites providing men’s and women’s shaving products, Bulldog, Jack Black and Billie DTC sites, and an acceleration of e-commerce sales in China through our partnership with T-Mall.

catalysts.sentence: On November 6, 2025, the Board of Directors approved the Company entering into an asset purchase agreement to sell its Feminine Care reportable segment for $340.0, subject to a purchase price adjustment upon closing.
